title: [FIRRTL] ModuleInliner crash while creating DictionaryAttr
skipped_reason: no SV content - this is a MLIR/FIRRTL bug, not a SystemVerilog feature issue. The code provided is MLIR (firrtl.circuit, firrtl.module, firrtl.wire, annotations), not SV. The crash occurs in C++ MLIR code (BuiltinAttributes.cpp:DictionaryAttr::get assertion), not in SV parsing or elaboration.
